post.description: Creates a new workspace. Owner is automatically set from JWT token.

409.description: Workspace with this name already exists

get.description: Returns workspaces where the current user is owner or member.
Returns all members of a workspace.

post.description: Directly adds a user to the workspace (requires OWNER or ADMIN).

patch.description: Changes the role of a workspace member.

delete.description: Removes a user from the workspace.

get.description: Returns all invitations for the workspace.

post.description: Sends an invitation to join the workspace by email.
Accepts a workspace invitation using a token.
Creates a new user account.

409.description: User with this email already exists

get.description: Returns paginated list of users.
Returns detailed user information.

delete.description: Marks user as deleted (can be restored).
⚠️ IRREVERSIBLE - Completely removes user from database.

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns authentication tokens.

409.description: User with this email already exists

post.description: Authenticates user and returns JWT tokens.
Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Revokes all tokens and sessions for the current user.

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user.

post.description: Sends a password reset link to the user's email.

202.description: Password reset email sent if user exists

post.description: Resets user password using a valid reset token.

put.description: Changes the password of the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns list of all roles.

post.description: Creates a new role with specified permissions.

409.description: Role with this slug already exists

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific role.

post.description: Adds one or more permissions to a specific role.

get.description: Returns list of all available permissions, optionally filtered by domain.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Filter by domain (e.g. identity, workspace, engineering)

post.description: Creates a new permission with domain.action slug format.

409.description: Permission with this slug already exists

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific permission.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a permission and removes it from all roles.

get.description: Returns paginated list of projects in the workspace.

post.description: Creates a new project in the workspace.

get.description: Returns a specific project by ID.
Returns all members of a project.

post.description: Adds a user to the project.

delete.description: Removes a user from the project.

get.description: Returns all notes of a project.

post.description: Adds a note to the project.

get.description: Returns paginated list of calculations in the workspace.

post.description:
Executes an engineering calculation via the Python engine, saves the result and returns it.

**Supported types:** BASIC-001, BASIC-002, BASIC-003, BASIC-004, BASIC-005, CABLE-001, CABLE-002, CABLE-003, CABLE-004, TRF-001, TRF-002, TRF-003, TRF-004, PROT-001, PQ-001, PQ-002, PQ-003, PQ-004, PQ-005, PQ-006

400.description: Validation failed — invalid inputs for the calculation type

403.description: This calculation requires a Pro or Enterprise plan

get.description: Returns a specific calculation.
Returns list of available calculation types based on user's plan.
Checks if the Python engineering engine is running.

post.description: آپلود قبض PDF/تصویر → OCR → تحلیل pandapower
وقتی OCR موفق نشد — داده مستقیم از فرم به Python ارسال می‌شود

get.description: Returns all available subscription plans with features and pricing.
Returns the active subscription and plan details for the workspace.

post.description: Subscribes the workspace to a new plan. Cancels existing subscription.

get.description: Returns current month usage for calculations, AI requests, etc.

post.description:
Upload a file using multipart/form-data.

Max size: 100MB.

Send as `Content-Type: multipart/form-data` with field name `file`.

400.description: Invalid file or file too large

get.description: Returns paginated files in the workspace.

get.summary: Get file info + presigned download URL

get.description: Streams the file content directly as binary.
Returns total files count and storage space used.
Returns in-app notifications for the authenticated user.

post.description: Sends a notification to the authenticated user. Useful for testing.

post.summary: Send a message and get AI response

get.summary: AI usage stats for current month

post.summary: پاسخ خودکار Groq AI به مشاوره
ارسال اعلان سراسری به همه (یا یک پلن خاص)

createdBy.description: ID of user who created the workspace

updatedBy.description: ID of last user who updated the workspace

userId.description: UUID of the user to add

password.description: Password (min 8 chars, with uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)

permissionIds.description: Array of permission UUIDs to assign to the role

slug.description: Unique permission slug in format: domain.action

domain.description: Domain name: identity | workspace | projects | engineering | ai | marketplace | storage | api | admin

type.description: Calculation type code (e.g. BASIC-001 = Ohm's Law)

inputs.description: Calculation inputs — structure depends on calculation type

projectId.description: Optional project ID to associate the calculation with
